Doctor.title: Meet Your Doctor
Doctor.name: Dr. Adriatik Suma
Doctor.bio: With years of extensive experience in comprehensive dentistry and implantology, Dr. Adriatik Suma is dedicated to providing high-end dental restorations and cosmetic transformations. His gentle approach and commitment to continuous learning ensure that patients receive the most advanced and painless treatments available today. Dr. Suma believes that every patient deserves a natural, confident smile designed to last a lifetime.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Clear answers to ease your mind.

questions.a: Not at all. The procedure is performed under local anesthesia, meaning you won't feel pain. Post-operative discomfort is usually minimal and manageable with standard painkillers.

questions.q: How long do porcelain veneers last?
questions.a: With proper care, good oral hygiene, and regular dental checkups, high-quality porcelain veneers can last anywhere from 10 to 15 years or more.
Yes! We specialize in pediatric dentistry, ensuring a welcoming, fear-free environment for children to build healthy dental habits early on.

questions.q: What should I expect during my first visit?
questions.a: Your first visit includes a comprehensive examination, digital X-rays if necessary, and an in-depth consultation where we discuss your goals and craft a personalized treatment plan.
